Bursa Wallet — web UI not built yet

The single-page app that ships embedded in bursa-wallet has not been built. You are seeing the placeholder that is committed in its place.

To build the web UI, run:

cd ui/web
npm install
npm run build

That compiles the app into ui/internal/webui/dist/ (replacing this file). Rebuild the bursa-wallet binary afterwards so the embedded assets are picked up.
